# E-Moto Title Service

E-Moto Title Service (eMotoTitle) is a professional electric motorcycle and e-bike title and registration service operating across all 50 US states.

## Services

- Electric motorcycle titling
- E-bike title and registration
- DMV services and document filing
- Lost title bond processing (surety bond at 150% of vehicle value)
- 100% digital submission — no DMV lines
- Expert document review and verification
- Real-time tracking dashboard
- eMoto insurance referrals

## Key Facts

- URL: https://emototitleservice.com
- Email: support@emototitleservice.com
- Service area: All 50 US states
- Filing time: As fast as 15 minutes
- Basic plan starts at $49
- Success rate: 99%
- Riders served: 5,000+

## How It Works

1. Choose your state and registration tier
2. Upload bill of sale, VIN photo, and government-issued ID
3. Receive official title and registration by mail with real-time tracking

## Supported Vehicle Types

- Class 1, 2, and 3 e-bikes
- Electric motorcycles
- High-powered electric two-wheelers requiring formal titling
- Any electric bike/moto requiring DMV registration under state law
